title: erica calycina var. longibracteata
intro: Erica calycina var. longibracteata, also known as the Heather or Bell Heather, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Heath family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erica calycina var. longibracteata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and help with respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
